tasks.subject: Checkout Task 0: FO checkout pages (Cart/Checkout/OrderConfirmation)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FrontOffice checkout surface — Cart actions, Checkout tunnel, OrderConfirmation read — as page objects with v7/v8/v9 stubs.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Cart/Page.php
- Create: src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Checkout/Page.php + v7/v8/v9 stubs
- Create: src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/OrderConfirmation/Page.php + v7/v8/v9 stubs
- Test: tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php && composer test-unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Cart/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Checkout/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/OrderConfirmation/Page.php", "tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php && composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cart proceedToCheckout", "Checkout tunnel methods+selectors", "OrderConfirmation isConfirmed/getOrderReference", "v9 stubs resolve", "test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Checkout Task 1: BackOffice Orders order lookup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Find an order in the BackOffice orders grid by reference.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Orders/Page.php
- Test: tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeOrdersTest.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeOrdersTest.php && composer test-unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Orders/Page.php", "tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeOrdersTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeOrdersTest.php && composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["order-lookup selectors declared", "filterByReference + getOrderReferenceInList", "test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Checkout Task 2: CheckoutOrder scenario + suite + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compose the pages into the end-to-end CheckoutOrder scenario + suite + existence/param tests.

**Files:**
- Create: src/Scenarios/CheckoutOrder.php
- Create: src/Tests/Suites/Scenarios/CheckoutOrder.php
- Test: tests/Unit/Scenarios/CheckoutOrderTest.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Scenarios/CheckoutOrderTest.php && composer test-unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Scenarios/CheckoutOrder.php", "src/Tests/Suites/Scenarios/CheckoutOrder.php", "tests/Unit/Scenarios/CheckoutOrderTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Scenarios/CheckoutOrderTest.php && composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scenario extends Scenario + params", "suite extends TestsSuite", "test-unit green"]}
```
